claim_boundary: admitted SQL local-source expression/operator correctness evidence only; not ANSI SQL, production semantic parity, or performance evidence
fallback_boundary: external engines may be isolated test oracles or baselines only and are not invoked by this validator
remaining_matrix_gaps: broad ANSI subquery parity beyond the admitted bounded local scalar/row-value IN/NOT IN, EXISTS/NOT EXISTS, quantified ANY/ALL, nested scalar IN, projected joined/grouped scalar/row-value IN/NOT IN/EXISTS/NOT EXISTS, projected quantified, source-qualified scalar/row-value IN/NOT IN/EXISTS/NOT EXISTS/quantified local subquery references, correlated outer.<column> subquery filter, subquery-backed predicate/CASE projection, HAVING-level scalar/row-value IN/NOT IN, EXISTS/NOT EXISTS, and correlated quantified variants, and deterministic outer-reference diagnostics
general fuzz execution beyond the deterministic seeded property lane

rows.claim_boundary: seeded property lane for scoped SQL local-source numeric expression projections only
rows.coercion_policy: integer arithmetic over admitted numeric columns and finite literals only
rows.invalid_input_behavior: invalid numeric expressions return deterministic unsupported diagnostics
rows.null_policy: null_propagating_for_arithmetic_operands; null_amount_not_selected_by_predicate

rows.claim_boundary: scoped SQL local-source TRY_CAST projection only
rows.coercion_policy: explicit TRY_CAST(column AS int64) only; no silent lossy coercion
rows.invalid_input_behavior: invalid scalar input becomes NULL under TRY_CAST and strict CAST invalid inputs block
rows.null_policy: TRY_CAST returns NULL for invalid scalar values

rows.claim_boundary: scoped LOWER/UPPER/TRIM/LENGTH projection semantics only
rows.coercion_policy: UTF-8 source columns only; non-UTF8 operands block deterministically
rows.invalid_input_behavior: missing or non-UTF8 string operands return deterministic unsupported diagnostics
rows.null_policy: string transforms and length preserve scalar-row NULL propagation where admitted

rows.claim_boundary: scoped local-source UTF-8 RLIKE/REGEXP/REGEXP_LIKE predicate semantics only; no locale/collation or regex projection/function completeness claim
rows.coercion_policy: scoped UTF-8 regex predicates compile Rust regex patterns and require UTF-8 string operands
rows.invalid_input_behavior: invalid regex patterns and non-UTF-8 operands block deterministically before fallback
rows.null_policy: SQL three-valued WHERE filtering; NULL input or pattern evaluates to NULL

rows.claim_boundary: scoped local-source UTF-8 LIKE predicate semantics with % and _ wildcards; no locale/collation or case-folding claim
rows.coercion_policy: scoped UTF-8 LIKE predicates lower SQL % and _ wildcards to ShardLoom-owned string predicate kernels and require UTF-8 string operands
rows.invalid_input_behavior: non-UTF8 operands block deterministically before fallback; locale-aware collation and case-folding semantics remain outside this claim
rows.null_policy: SQL three-valued WHERE filtering; NULL input or pattern evaluates to NULL

rows.claim_boundary: scoped local-source UTF-8 LIKE ESCAPE predicate semantics for single-character escape literals; no locale/collation or case-folding claim
rows.coercion_policy: scoped UTF-8 LIKE ESCAPE predicates require a single-character ESCAPE literal and lower escaped %, _, or escape characters to ShardLoom-owned string predicate kernels
rows.invalid_input_behavior: non-UTF8 operands, empty or multi-character ESCAPE literals, trailing escape characters, and escape misuse block deterministically before fallback
rows.null_policy: SQL three-valued WHERE filtering; NULL input or pattern evaluates to NULL

rows.claim_boundary: scoped Date32 and UTC-or-fixed-offset timestamp extract projection semantics only
rows.coercion_policy: explicit cast to date32/timestamp_micros plus scoped ISO UTC Z or fixed-offset timestamp parsing
rows.invalid_input_behavior: invalid date/time literals and unsupported timestamp forms block deterministically
rows.null_policy: temporal extract returns NULL for NULL temporal operands where admitted

rows.claim_boundary: scoped COALESCE and NULLIF projection semantics only
rows.coercion_policy: source/fallback and source/sentinel dtypes must match after binding
rows.invalid_input_behavior: mismatched fallback or sentinel dtype returns deterministic unsupported diagnostics
rows.null_policy: COALESCE uses matching non-null fallback; NULLIF returns NULL on matching sentinel

rows.claim_boundary: scoped SQL predicate projection semantics only
rows.coercion_policy: admitted scalar comparisons over bound source columns and DATE literals only
rows.invalid_input_behavior: missing source columns and unsupported predicate shapes block deterministically
rows.null_policy: SQL three-valued comparison projection plus IS NULL and IS NOT TRUE/FALSE behavior

rows.claim_boundary: scoped SQL IS DISTINCT FROM and IS NOT DISTINCT FROM local-source predicate and predicate-projection semantics only; no broad ANSI parity claim
rows.coercion_policy: null-safe comparison operands must bind to admitted source columns or scalar literals and lower to ShardLoom-owned null/comparison/logical predicates
rows.invalid_input_behavior: unsupported RHS shapes, unbound columns, and unsupported literal forms block deterministically before fallback
rows.null_policy: SQL null-safe comparison semantics: two NULL operands are not distinct; one NULL and one non-NULL operand are distinct; non-NULL operands compare by admitted equality semantics

rows.claim_boundary: scoped SQL local-source ORDER BY top-N with explicit NULLS FIRST/LAST only; no implicit null ordering, broad sort, collation, or performance claim
rows.coercion_policy: explicit NULLS FIRST or NULLS LAST is required before null sort keys are admitted; non-null sort keys keep existing numeric, UTF-8, binary, or scoped complex result-boundary ordering rules
rows.invalid_input_behavior: implicit null ordering, unsupported sort-key dtypes, duplicate sort keys, and missing sort columns block deterministically before fallback
rows.null_policy: explicit SQL NULLS FIRST/LAST determines null precedence independently from ASC/DESC direction; equal null keys preserve stable input tie order

rows.claim_boundary: scoped SQL subquery-backed predicate and CASE projection semantics over bounded local sources only
rows.coercion_policy: projection subquery predicates must bind to admitted local source columns and reserved outer.<column> references only
rows.invalid_input_behavior: unsupported projection subquery shapes and unbound outer references block deterministically
rows.null_policy: SQL three-valued IN-subquery projection predicate behavior; CASE predicate selects THEN only on true

rows.claim_boundary: scoped SQL local-source aggregate HAVING over emitted aggregate output rows only
rows.coercion_policy: HAVING columns must bind to aggregate output aliases or selected group keys
rows.invalid_input_behavior: HAVING over non-aggregate rows or non-output source columns returns deterministic unsupported diagnostics
rows.null_policy: HAVING evaluates SQL WHERE-style truth over aggregate output rows; non-true or NULL predicate results are filtered out

rows.claim_boundary: scoped CONCAT/SUBSTR/LEFT/RIGHT/REPLACE SQL local-source semantics only
rows.coercion_policy: UTF-8 source columns and scalar UTF-8/int literals only
rows.invalid_input_behavior: unsupported string function shapes return deterministic diagnostics
rows.null_policy: composed UTF-8 string functions propagate NULL operands where admitted

rows.claim_boundary: scoped UTC-or-fixed-offset date/timestamp arithmetic and difference projections only
rows.coercion_policy: explicit casts plus scoped ISO Date32 and UTC Z or fixed-offset timestamp_micros parsing only
rows.invalid_input_behavior: invalid dates, invalid timestamp syntax/offsets, named timezone database forms, and out-of-range intervals block deterministically
rows.null_policy: temporal arithmetic and differences propagate NULL temporal operands

rows.claim_boundary: scoped ANSI interval literals inside ShardLoom temporal arithmetic helper functions only; no arbitrary ANSI interval arithmetic or timezone semantics claim
rows.coercion_policy: scoped ANSI INTERVAL '<signed integer>' DAY in DATE_ADD_DAYS/DATE_SUB_DAYS and DAY/HOUR/MINUTE/SECOND in TIMESTAMP_ADD_SECONDS/TIMESTAMP_SUB_SECONDS
rows.invalid_input_behavior: malformed interval literals, unsupported units, and out-of-range intervals block deterministically before fallback
rows.null_policy: temporal arithmetic propagates NULL source temporal operands; interval literals must be non-null signed integer DAY/SECOND-family units

rows.claim_boundary: scoped CASE WHEN computed projection semantics only
rows.coercion_policy: THEN and ELSE branch dtypes must match after source-column binding
rows.invalid_input_behavior: mixed branch dtypes and unsupported predicate leaves block deterministically
rows.null_policy: CASE predicates use SQL truth where NULL selects ELSE

rows.claim_boundary: scoped SQL binary hex literal projection semantics only; not broad binary dtype input support
rows.coercion_policy: X'<hex>' literal projection values are admitted as binary scalar bytes; scoped BINARY/BLOB text literals, binary casts, and UNHEX/FROM_BASE64 source-column helper projections are tracked in separate executable rows
rows.invalid_input_behavior: odd-length or non-hex binary literal bodies block deterministically before fallback
rows.null_policy: not_applicable_binary_literal_projection

rows.claim_boundary: scoped SQL BINARY/BLOB text literal projection semantics only; not broad binary dtype input support
rows.coercion_policy: BINARY '<utf8>' and BLOB '<utf8>' projection literals encode scoped UTF-8 literal text as binary scalar bytes
rows.invalid_input_behavior: malformed or unclosed BINARY/BLOB string literals block deterministically before fallback
rows.null_policy: not_applicable_binary_literal_projection

rows.claim_boundary: scoped SQL ARRAY literal projection to JSONL result boundary and CSV JSON-text output; scoped DISTINCT equality, complex ordering, CSV sink evidence, and typed nested compatibility sink preservation are tracked in separate complex rows; not nested source decoding, ORC nested output, or broad nested SQL parity
rows.coercion_policy: ARRAY[...] projection elements admit scalar SQL literals only; no source-column array expressions or list accessors
rows.invalid_input_behavior: non-literal ARRAY elements, list accessors, list casts, joins, subquery membership, all-null nested typed sinks without child schema, ORC nested output blocks deterministically before fallback; scoped complex ordering is limited to admitted result-boundary projection rows
rows.null_policy: array elements preserve NULL as nested JSON null inside the result boundary

rows.claim_boundary: scoped SQL STRUCT source-column projection to JSONL result boundary and CSV JSON-text output; scoped DISTINCT equality, complex ordering, CSV sink evidence, and typed nested compatibility sink preservation are tracked in separate complex rows; not nested source decoding, ORC nested output, or broad nested SQL parity
rows.coercion_policy: STRUCT(...) projection fields admit source columns only; no struct literals, accessors, casts, row constructors, or expression fields
rows.invalid_input_behavior: missing struct source columns, duplicate fields, accessors, casts, joins, subquery membership, all-null nested typed sinks without child schema, ORC nested output blocks deterministically before fallback; scoped complex ordering is limited to admitted result-boundary projection rows
rows.null_policy: source NULL values are preserved as nested JSON null fields inside the STRUCT result boundary

rows.claim_boundary: scoped CSV JSON-text output for already-admitted ARRAY literal and STRUCT source-column projection values only; typed nested schema preservation for inferable complex rows is tracked separately for Parquet/Arrow IPC/Avro/Vortex; not nested source decoding or ORC nested sinks
rows.coercion_policy: CSV sink serializes admitted ARRAY/STRUCT result values as JSON text cells after ShardLoom-owned result-batch evaluation; static nested type metadata is intentionally not preserved
rows.invalid_input_behavior: all-null nested typed sinks without child schema keep deterministic typed_complex_child_schema_not_admitted blockers; ORC nested sinks keep deterministic typed_complex_preservation_not_admitted blockers while Vortex typed nested output is admitted when a nested Arrow schema can be inferred from non-null values or carried from source-schema child fields
rows.null_policy: nested NULL array elements and STRUCT fields are preserved as JSON null text inside CSV cells

rows.claim_boundary: scoped feature-gated local structured source decoding for Arrow list/large-list/fixed-size-list and struct values into ShardLoom ScalarValue::List/Struct through the JSONL result boundary and CSV JSON-text output; executable CLI proof covers Arrow IPC and the shared materializer covers the admitted Arrow array families surfaced by local Parquet/Arrow IPC/Avro/ORC readers; typed Parquet/Arrow IPC/Avro/Vortex nested sink preservation is tracked in typed_nested_compatibility_sink_preservation; not nested accessors, casts, broad nested ordering, complex-key joins, subquery membership materialization, ORC nested output or production SQL nested parity

rows.invalid_input_behavior: all-null nested source projections with source-schema Arrow child-field evidence are admitted for Parquet/Arrow IPC/Avro/Vortex typed sinks; all-null computed nested columns or source projections with only coarse list/struct dtype evidence keep deterministic typed_complex_child_schema_not_admitted blockers; ORC nested sinks keep deterministic typed_complex_preservation_not_admitted blockers

rows.claim_boundary: scoped feature-gated typed nested compatibility sink preservation for ShardLoom List/Struct result columns through Parquet, Arrow IPC, Avro, and scoped local Vortex when one stable Arrow nested dtype is inferred from non-null values or carried from raw source-column child schema evidence; executable CLI proof covers Arrow IPC nested source projection to Parquet readback, all-null Arrow IPC source-schema projection to Parquet/Arrow IPC/Avro/Vortex, and shared writer/readback tests cover Parquet/Arrow IPC/Avro/Vortex; all-null computed complex columns or coarse-only source dtype hints without child schema fail closed with typed_complex_child_schema_not_admitted and remain outside the claim; not ORC nested output, nested accessors/casts, complex subquery membership, broad nested ordering, complex-key joins, or production SQL nested parity
rows.coercion_policy: ShardLoom infers one stable Arrow nested dtype per result column from non-null List/Struct values or preserves canonicalized Arrow child schema hints from raw source projections, preserves nested NULL list elements and struct fields, and blocks before provider writer conversion when neither non-null values nor source child schema can provide a child type; no external engine is invoked
rows.invalid_input_behavior: all-null complex columns without child schema block with typed_complex_child_schema_not_admitted before structured writer conversion; ORC nested output blocks with typed_complex_preservation_not_admitted before provider conversion while scoped local Vortex typed nested output uses ArrayRef::from_arrow(RecordBatch) when a nested Arrow schema can be inferred from non-null values or carried from source-schema child fields; mixed nested scalar families or unstable struct field layouts block deterministically
rows.null_policy: top-level nested NULL values remain typed NULLs in compatibility sinks when a child schema is inferable from non-null values or carried from source schema; nested list NULL elements and struct NULL fields are preserved as typed nested nulls

rows.claim_boundary: scoped SQL SELECT DISTINCT equality over ARRAY/STRUCT projection outputs through the JSONL result boundary and CSV JSON-text output; scoped complex ordering and typed nested compatibility sink preservation are tracked in separate rows; not joins, subquery membership equality, accessors, ORC nested output or production nested parity

rows.invalid_input_behavior: accessors, casts, joins, subquery membership, NULL top-level sort keys, all-null typed nested sinks without child schema, ORC nested output blocks deterministically before fallback

rows.claim_boundary: scoped SQL UNION ORDER BY over ARRAY/STRUCT projection outputs through canonical structural JSONL result-boundary sort keys and CSV JSON-text output; typed nested compatibility sink preservation is tracked separately; not broad ANSI nested ordering, joins, subquery membership equality, accessors, casts, ORC nested output or production nested parity

rows.invalid_input_behavior: mismatched branch dtypes, accessors, casts, joins, subquery membership, NULL top-level sort keys, all-null typed nested sinks without child schema, ORC nested output blocks deterministically before fallback

rows.claim_boundary: scoped SQL binary cast projection and equality/inequality predicate semantics for source-backed UTF-8 column, string-transform, and string-function argument expressions only; scoped binary cast ordering is tracked in the separate binary_cast_ordering_predicate row; scoped binary source predicate/order, Parquet/Arrow IPC/Avro/ORC flat scalar binary sink evidence, and local Vortex flat scalar sink evidence including nullable/all-null known flat scalar result columns with dtype/family evidence are covered outside this cast row; unknown or unsupported NULL-bearing Vortex output batches block before writer conversion; not broad binary sink preservation, binary cast expressions outside the admitted source-backed UTF-8 expression subset, or broad binary execution

rows.claim_boundary: scoped SQL binary cast lexicographic ordering predicate semantics for source-backed UTF-8 column, string-transform, and string-function argument expressions only; scoped binary source predicate/order, Parquet/Arrow IPC/Avro/ORC flat scalar binary sink evidence, and local Vortex flat scalar sink evidence including nullable/all-null known flat scalar result columns with dtype/family evidence are covered outside this cast row; unknown or unsupported NULL-bearing Vortex output batches block before writer conversion; not broad binary sink preservation, binary cast expressions outside the admitted source-backed UTF-8 expression subset, broad binary execution, locale/collation, or production ordering parity
rows.coercion_policy: explicit CAST/TRY_CAST(<utf8-expression> AS binary/blob/varbinary) encodes admitted UTF-8 expression values as bytes before bytewise lexicographic comparison against explicit binary literals; admitted cast arguments are source-backed UTF-8 column, string-transform, and string-function expressions

rows.claim_boundary: scoped SQL/Python decimal128 cast projection and predicate semantics plus exact exponent-notation normalization, feature-gated Parquet/Arrow IPC/Avro typed decimal compatibility sink preservation, and scoped local Vortex flat scalar output preservation including nullable/all-null known flat scalar result columns with dtype/family evidence only; mixed-scale decimal arithmetic and exact division are tracked in the separate decimal_arithmetic_projection row; not broad ANSI coercion, ORC typed decimal sinks, performance, or production claim
rows.coercion_policy: explicit CAST/TRY_CAST(column AS decimal128/decimal/numeric(p,s)) parses scoped fixed-scale decimal text, exact exponent notation that normalizes to the declared target scale, and numeric scalar inputs exactly into Decimal128 values; JSONL emits exact decimal strings, CSV emits exact decimal text, feature-gated Parquet/Arrow IPC/Avro compatibility sinks preserve scoped decimal128 precision/scale, and scoped local Vortex known flat scalar output preserves scoped decimal128 precision/scale through the feature-gated writer/reopen path, including nullable/all-null decimal result columns with dtype evidence
rows.invalid_input_behavior: invalid decimal text, inexact exponent-scale values, over-scale values, over-precision values, unsupported source dtypes, and ORC typed decimal sinks block deterministically before fallback
rows.null_policy: decimal casts are null-propagating; TRY_CAST returns NULL on invalid decimal input and preserves NULL inputs

rows.claim_boundary: scoped SQL/Python decimal128 add/subtract/multiply projection semantics over same-scale and mixed-scale decimal128 operands, integer operands, mixed-scale decimal comparisons, exact fixed-scale decimal division, feature-gated Parquet/Arrow IPC/Avro typed decimal compatibility sink preservation, and scoped local Vortex flat scalar output preservation including nullable/all-null known flat scalar result columns with dtype/family evidence only; not broad ANSI decimal coercion, ORC typed decimal sinks, performance, or production claim
rows.coercion_policy: explicit CAST(column-or-literal AS decimal128/decimal/numeric(p,s)) produces exact fixed-scale Decimal128 operands; add/subtract align operands to a common scale; multiply preserves exact fixed-scale output when precision and scale remain within decimal128 bounds; division emits decimal128(38,max(input_scales,6)) only when the quotient is exact at that scoped fixed output scale; feature-gated Parquet/Arrow IPC/Avro compatibility sinks and scoped local Vortex known flat scalar output preserve scoped decimal128 precision/scale, including nullable/all-null decimal result columns with dtype evidence
rows.invalid_input_behavior: non-exact decimal division, decimal division by zero, decimal arithmetic overflow, output precision overflow, invalid decimal text, unsupported decimal arithmetic operands, and ORC typed decimal sinks fail deterministically before fallback
rows.null_policy: decimal arithmetic is null-propagating and preserves the admitted decimal output dtype for typed NULL operands

rows.claim_boundary: scoped SQL/Python binary helper projection semantics for local source-backed UTF-8 column, string-transform, and string-function argument expressions only; scoped binary source predicate/order, Parquet/Arrow IPC/Avro/ORC flat scalar binary sink evidence, and local Vortex flat scalar sink evidence including nullable/all-null known flat scalar result columns with dtype/family evidence are covered outside this helper row; unknown or unsupported NULL-bearing Vortex output batches block before writer conversion; not broad binary sink preservation, binary helper expressions outside the admitted source-backed UTF-8 expression subset, or broad binary input support
rows.coercion_policy: UNHEX(<utf8-expression>) decodes even-length hexadecimal text; FROM_BASE64(<utf8-expression>) decodes strict standard padded base64 text; admitted helper arguments are source-backed UTF-8 column, string-transform, and string-function expressions; binary casts, BINARY/BLOB text literals, and scoped columnar binary source projection are tracked outside this helper row

rows.null_policy: UNHEX and FROM_BASE64 projections are null-propagating over admitted source-backed UTF-8 expressions

rows.claim_boundary: scoped SQL/Python binary helper predicate semantics for local source-backed UTF-8 column, string-transform, and string-function argument expressions only; helper predicates decode UNHEX/FROM_BASE64 before comparing with explicit binary literals; direct binary source predicates, binary casts, flat scalar sink evidence, and local Vortex known flat scalar sink preservation are covered outside this row; not broad binary execution, broad binary sink preservation, binary helper expressions outside the admitted source-backed UTF-8 expression subset, or broad binary input support
rows.coercion_policy: UNHEX(<utf8-expression>) and FROM_BASE64(<utf8-expression>) decode admitted source-backed UTF-8 expression text to binary bytes, then compare bytewise against X'<hex>', BINARY '<utf8>', or BLOB '<utf8>' literals

rows.claim_boundary: scoped literal IN predicate NULL semantics only
